title: Filter High Earning Employees
description: Practice basic SELECT and WHERE clauses
question: The HR team needs a report of all high earning engineers. Write a query to fetch this data from the employees table.
requirements: Return name, department, and salary columns

title: Customer Order Summary
question: The sales team wants to see all orders along with the customer name who placed them. Write a query that combines both tables.
requirements: Return customer name, order date, and order amount

title: Department Salary Analysis
description: Practice GROUP BY and aggregate functions
question: The finance team wants a breakdown of salary spending per department. Write a query to summarize this data.
requirements: Calculate average and total salary per department
Only include departments with more than 2 employees
